mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lesson_payment_order (lesson_id, course_id, student_uid, teacher_uid, lesson_type, total_amount_fen, platform_fee_rate, platform_fee_amount_fen, teacher_income_amount_fen, status, payment_order_no, paid_at) VALUES (#{lessonId}, #{courseId}, #{studentUid}, #{teacherUid}, #{lessonType}, #{totalAmountFen}, #{platformFeeRate}, #{platformFeeAmountFen}, #{teacherIncomeAmountFen}, #{status}, #{paymentOrderNo}, #{paidAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, lesson_id, course_id, student_uid, teacher_uid, lesson_type, total_amount_fen, platform_fee_rate, platform_fee_amount_fen, teacher_income_amount_fen, status, payment_order_no, paid_at, create_time, update_time FROM lesson_payment_order WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, lesson_id, course_id, student_uid, teacher_uid, lesson_type, total_amount_fen, platform_fee_rate, platform_fee_amount_fen, teacher_income_amount_fen, status, payment_order_no, paid_at, create_time, update_time FROM lesson_payment_order WHERE lesson_id = #{lessonId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, lesson_id, course_id, student_uid, teacher_uid, lesson_type, total_amount_fen, platform_fee_rate, platform_fee_amount_fen, teacher_income_amount_fen, status, payment_order_no, paid_at, create_time, update_time FROM lesson_payment_order WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PAYING') ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE lesson_payment_order SET status = 'PAYING', update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE lesson_payment_order SET status = 'PAID', payment_order_no = #{paymentOrderNo}, paid_at = #{paidAt}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PAYING')
